creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please clarify what 'make config in poudriere' means?
Are you talking about 'poudriere options', or 'poudriere testport -i', or 'poudriere jail -s' and jexecing into the jail first?

Does your host have a /usr/bin/bmake? Is that a copy of the port version from /usr/local/bin/bmake? That may cause the problem.
